chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1842 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 24-11-2025 Mr. Sarang Latif Panhwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahbaz Ali, Law Officer, NADRA. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Statements/comments filed by respondents No.8&9 so also by Law Officer, NADRA are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioner. Record reflects that CNIC of the petitioner was blocked pursuant to order dated 02.10.2023, passed by this Court at Principal Seat in Spl. Crl. A.T.A.No.133 of 2020. The petitioner is, therefore, directed to approach the said Court in the same litigation for redressal of his grievance. This petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
